meta.tagline: Learn English with a Fulbright Scholar
meta.description: Premium English instruction by Riadh Koubaa — 17 years teaching, Fulbright Scholar at UC Santa Barbara, certified trainer from Arizona State University. Courses, books, and 1-on-1 sessions for students and professionals across Tunisia.

hero.sub: 17 years of classroom experience. Real conversation, proven methods, and a teacher who genuinely tracks your progress lesson by lesson.

categories.title: What would you like to learn?
categories.sub: From beginners to exam candidates — there is a clear path for every level.
categories.conversation_sub: Real-life dialogues, pronunciation drills, and the confidence to speak in any context.
categories.writing_sub: Essays, professional emails, and academic writing — clear, structured, and impactful.
categories.exams_sub: TOEFL, IELTS, Cambridge — strategy, mock tests, and pacing tailored to your target.
categories.school_sub: Curriculum-aligned support for primary and secondary students across Tunisia.

courses_page.sub: Pick the level and format that fits your goals.

books_page.sub: Hand-crafted workbooks aligned with the Tunisian curriculum.

about.title: Meet Riadh Koubaa
about.sub: Seventeen years in the classroom, on three continents.
about.bio_p1: Born and raised in Sfax, Riadh holds a Bachelor's degree in English from the University of Arts and Human Sciences of Sfax. He has taught English at Amra High School for the past seventeen years.
about.bio_p2: In 2014 he was selected for the Fulbright Foreign Language Teaching Assistant program and spent a year at the University of California, Santa Barbara, teaching Arabic and immersing himself in American academic culture.
about.bio_p3: He is a certified teacher trainer through Arizona State University and runs a YouTube channel followed by thousands of Tunisian learners. His work bridges classroom rigor with the conversational fluency students actually need.

video_section.title: Watch a lesson before you book
video_section.sub: Browse the YouTube channel and get a feel for the teaching style.

cta_strip.title: Ready to start speaking with confidence?
cta_strip.sub: Reserve a seat or book a 1-on-1 session today.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.sub: Reach out by form, phone, email, or WhatsApp — whichever you prefer.

form.name: Full name
form.message_ph: Tell Riadh what you want to achieve.
form.consent: By submitting, your details open WhatsApp with a message ready to send.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.sub: If you do not find your answer here, message Riadh directly on WhatsApp.

items.online_1_q: Are courses fully online or in person?
items.online_1_a: Both. Most courses run live online over Zoom; in-person sessions are held in Sfax.
items.online_2_q: Do I need any special software?
items.online_2_a: Just Zoom and a stable internet connection. Course materials are shared as PDF.
items.online_3_q: What if I miss a lesson?
items.online_3_a: Sessions are recorded so you can catch up. A makeup slot is available on request.
items.payment_1_a: Bank transfer (BIAT, BH, Attijari), D17, or cash on the first session.
items.payment_2_a: Yes — a 50% deposit and a second 50% halfway through the course.
items.pricing_1_q: Why is the price in Tunisian Dinar?
items.pricing_1_a: All courses and books are billed in Tunisian Dinar (TND). No hidden fees.
items.pricing_2_a: Yes. Bring three friends and each of you gets 15% off the listed price.

footer.tagline: Learn English with a teacher who has spent seventeen years in the classroom and one year on a Fulbright in California.
